channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Utah HC falls in overtime to Dallas, 3-2
item.description: DALLAS (AP) - Thomas Harley scored 3:01 into overtime to give the Dallas Stars their fourth straight win, 3-2 against the Utah Hockey Club at American Airlines Center on Saturday. Matt Duchene found Harley near the right post after collecting his own rebound in front of the net.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: White nails career-high nine 3s, scores 33 as Bulls beat Knicks 139-126 after honoring Rose
item.description: Coby White made a career-high nine 3-pointers and scored 33 points, Zach LaVine also had 33 and the Chicago Bulls beat the New York Knicks 139-126 after honoring former MVP Derrick Rose on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Touchdown Tommy! Montana State's Mellott wins Walter Payton Award as top FCS offensive player
item.description: Montana State quarterback Tommy Mellott won the Walter Payton Award as the Football Championship Subdivision offensive player of the year Saturday night, two days before the top-ranked Bobcats face North Dakota State in the title game.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Chicago Bulls plan to retire Derrick Rose's jersey next season
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Derrick Rose wasn't sure how he will feel when sees his No. 1 hanging from the rafters. He was still trying to process the news. The Chicago Bulls announced Saturday they plan to retire Rose's jersey sometime next season.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Leonard says returning to the court is the easy part after making season debut for Clippers
item.description: After what Kawhi Leonard has gone through the past nine months, returning to the court for the Los Angeles Clippers was the easy part.
item.dc:creator: Joe Reedy, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Mitty’s McKenna Woliczko, the Bay Area’s best girls basketball player, injured in loss to Ontario Christian
item.description: Archbishop Mitty's five-star forward McKenna Woliczko left the game in the second quarter with an apparent knee injury
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Ravens wrap up the AFC North with a 35-10 rout of Cleveland; Jackson surpasses 4,000 yards passing
item.description: BALTIMORE (AP) — The road to a division title was bumpy for the Baltimore Ravens, who started 0-2, faced a schedule packed with playoff teams and had to rally from a two-game deficit with four to play.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Hideki Matsuyama sets personal best with 11 birdies for a 62 and leads Morikawa by 1 at Kapalua
item.description: KAPALUA, Hawaii (AP) — Collin Morikawa had to judge how his ball would come out of the first cut of rough on the 16th hole at Kapalua, and it was close to perfect, settling 20 inches away for a sure birdie in his terrific duel with Hideki Matsuyama. Matsuyama was some 20 yards closer.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Washington football player declares for job market, instead of NFL, in hilarious post
item.description: University of Washington linebacker Drew Fowler posted that he is declaring for the job market instead of the NFL in hilarious social media post.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Hideki Matsuyama sets the target at Kapalua and leads Collin Morikawa by 1
item.description: KAPALUA, Hawaii (AP) — Collin Morikawa has played Kapalua enough to know that trailing Hideki Matsuyama by seven shots early in the second round was no reason to panic. Sure enough, he nearly caught up to the Japanese star on Friday at The Sentry.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Charlie Morton agrees to a 1-year, $15 million deal with the Orioles
item.description: BALTIMORE (AP) — Veteran right-hander Charlie Morton and the Baltimore Orioles agreed to a one-year, $15 million contract on Friday. The 41-year-old Morton, the hero of Game 7 of the 2017 World Series with Houston, will try to fill a hole in Baltimore's rotation.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jets interview former Titans coach Mike Vrabel for their head coaching job
item.description: FLORHAM PARK, N.J. (AP) — The New York Jets interviewed former Tennessee Titans coach Mike Vrabel on Friday for their head coaching vacancy. Vrabel is the second known coaching candidate to meet with the Jets, who announced they completed their interview with him.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utah HC storms back at Calgary to end five-game skid
item.description: CALGARY (ABC4 Sports) - Lawson Crouse scored twice, and the Utah Hockey Club rallied for a 5-3 win against the Calgary Flames at Scotiabank Saddledome on Thursday to end a five-game losing skid.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Red Rocks begins 50th season with big dreams
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - After finishing third in the NCAA Nationals last season, the Utah gymnastics team has reloaded and is ready to make a run at its first national title in 30 years. The Red Rocks begin its 50th season Friday at home against Utah State loaded with talent.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Rams QB Matthew Stafford gets home inspected amid string of NFL home burglaries
item.description: A string of high-profile burglaries at the homes of NFL players that has even prompted a warning from the FBI has led one of the brightest stars of Los Angeles to take a proactive approach to the issue.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Eagles coach Nick Sirianni set to rest Saquon Barkley in finale and end chance at NFL rushing record
item.description: Saquon Barkley had a heart-to-heart talk with his dad that was more coated in heartbreak than hope over the Philadelphia Eagles running back's pursuit of the NFL single-season rushing record.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Camarillo High School to honor NBA star alumnus with jersey retirement
item.description: Camarillo High School will honor one of its most successful alumni when it retires the No. 24 jersey of Jaime Jaquez Jr. later this month.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Kiszla, KTLA 5

item.title: Utah HC loses fifth straight game, 4-1 to Edmonton
item.description: EDMONTON (ABC4 Sports) - Connor McDavid and Leon Draisaitl each extended their point streaks to 12 games for the Edmonton Oilers, who won 4-1 against the Utah Hockey Club at Rogers Place on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Blues have all the fun in convincing victory over the Blackhawks in the Winter Classic
item.description: The Winter Classic returned to Wrigley on the final day of 2024, and the Chicago Blackhawks threw quite a party but ended up on the losing end.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: How the Chicago Blackhawks brought the St. Louis Blues to life
item.description: As the St. Louis Blues and Chicago Blackhawks gear up for the 2025 NHL Winter Classic, it's worth revisiting a fascinating piece of hockey history: The Blues franchise, as St. Louis knows it today, might not exist without a helping hand from their cross-state rival.
item.dc:creator: Joey Schneider, WGN 9

item.title: Bears wrap up trying 2024 season vs. Packers on Sunday at noon in Green Bay
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — When the ball left the hand of Commanders quarterback Jayden Daniels with no time left on the clock on Oct. 27 in Washington, the Bears were 4-2 and just needed to swat the ball to the ground to finish off their fourth straight win. Instead, the ball was batted into the air.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: LeBron James at 40: A milestone birthday arrives Monday for the NBA's all-time scoring leader
item.description: When LeBron James broke another NBA record earlier this month, the one for most regular-season minutes played in a career, his Los Angeles Lakers teammates handled the moment in typical locker room fashion. They made fun of him. “They told me I’m old as hell,” James quipped.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jayden Daniels dazzles again as Commanders clinch a playoff spot by beating Falcons 30-24 in OT
item.description: Jayden Daniels connected with Zach Ertz in overtime for his third touchdown pass of the game to clinch a playoff spot by beating the Atlanta Falcons 30-24 in overtime Sunday night in a back-and-forth prime-time showdown between highly drafted rookie quarterbacks.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: NFC's No. 1 seed comes down to Vikings-Lions showdown at Detroit in Week 18
item.description: The NFC’s No. 1 seed will come down to the final game of the regular season when the Detroit Lions host the Minnesota Vikings next Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jake Evans scores for the career-high 4th consecutive game, surging Canadiens beat Lightning 5-2
item.description: Jake Evans scored for the career-high fifth consecutive game and the surging Montreal Canadiens beat the Tampa Bay Lightning 5-2 on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: ERIK ERLENDSSON Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Mayfield throws 5 TD passes and Bucs keep playoff, NFC South hopes alive with 48-14 rout of Panthers
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — The Tampa Bay Buccaneers played like a team determined to do whatever's necessary to make the playoffs.
item.dc:creator: FRED GOODALL, Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Lakers send D'Angelo Russell to Nets in trade for Dorian Finney-Smith, Shake Milton
item.description: The Los Angeles Lakers have traded guard D'Angelo Russell to the Brooklyn Nets for forward Dorian Finney-Smith and guard Shake Milton. The Lakers also sent forward Maxwell Lewis and three second-round draft picks to Brooklyn on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Report: Cubs deal former 1B prospect Matt Mervis to Marlins for utilityman
item.description: The Cubs have traded one former infield prospect for another. ESPN's Jeff Passan reported on his X feed early Sunday afternoon that the Cubs have dealt first baseman Matt Mervis to the Miami Marlins for utilityman Vidal Bruján, according to sources.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9
